name: best-minds
description: Simulator-mindset methodology skill: don't ask 'what do you think,' ask 'which group of people would best explore this, and what would they say?' Based on Karpathy's 2025 simulator view; includes anti-sycophancy guardrails, quote verification, blind-spot scan, and a two-stage sub-agent round-table flow. Replies follow the user's language.
